content.tagline: Dedicated Yacht Care, Every Detail Matters
content.about:
At Category Five Yacht Management, we bring an unparalleled level of dedication and expertise to yacht detailing and marine services throughout Boca Raton, Florida, and the surrounding coastal communities across Palm Beach, Broward, and Miami-Dade counties. Based out of Fort Lauderdale, FL, we work with yacht owners up and down the South Florida coastline who expect their vessels to be maintained to the highest standard — and we take that responsibility seriously.

We specialize in comprehensive yacht management and boat detailing and cleaning services designed to keep luxury vessels in peak condition. From full-service yacht management that handles the day-to-day logistics and upkeep of your boat, to hands-on detailing work that restores and protects every surface, our team approaches each vessel with the same level of care. Whether it's a routine wash-down, interior and exterior detailing, hull cleaning, or ongoing maintenance coordination, we handle it with the same thoroughness every time.

Our clients are yacht owners throughout South Florida — from the marinas and waterways of Fort Lauderdale and Pompano Beach to the docks of Boca Raton, Miami, and beyond — who want a trusted partner they can count on. We've built our reputation not on flashy promises but on showing up, doing the work right, and treating every vessel like it's our own. If you take pride in your boat, you'll feel right at home working with us.
content.seoTitle: Category Five Yacht Management | Yacht Management Fort Lauderdale, FL
content.seoDescription: Yacht management & boat detailing in Fort Lauderdale, FL. Serving South Florida including Palm Beach, Broward & Miami-Dade. Call Category Five today.

serviceDescriptions.Yacht Management: Category Five Yacht Management handles the full scope of managing your vessel — from coordinating routine maintenance schedules and vendor relationships to overseeing repairs and ensuring your yacht is always ready to go when you are. We act as your dedicated point of contact so that ownership stays enjoyable and the operational side stays organized. Whether you're aboard regularly or only part of the year, we keep your investment protected and well-maintained year-round.
serviceDescriptions.Boat Detailing & Cleaning: Our boat detailing and cleaning service covers everything from thorough exterior wash-downs and hull cleaning to full interior and exterior detail work that restores your vessel's finish and protects it from the elements. We work on luxury yachts and recreational boats alike, using professional-grade products and techniques suited to marine surfaces. Regular detailing not only keeps your boat looking sharp but helps preserve gel coat, brightwork, and upholstery over the long haul.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Category Five Yacht Management is based in Fort Lauderdale, FL and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within an 80-mile radius.
commonProjects: Full exterior yacht detail including hull polish and wax protection
Interior cabin cleaning and upholstery care for luxury vessels
Routine wash-down and maintenance cleaning after offshore trips
Ongoing yacht management for part-time or absentee boat owners
Brightwork cleaning and teak restoration on sailboats and motoryachts
Coordinating seasonal maintenance schedules and vendor services for yacht owners
Pre-sale yacht detailing to prepare vessels for listing or inspection
